mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, writer, name, password, email, regidate FROM gueuser WHERE password = #{password} and writer = #{writer}
SELECT user_id as userId, writer, name, password, email, regidate FROM gueuser WHERE writer = #{writer}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gueuser( writer, name, password, email ) VALUES( #{writer}, #{name}, #{password}, #{email}
)
mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, writer, name, password, email, regidate FROM gueuser WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT t.id, t.user_id as userId, u.writer as writer, u.name as name, t.title, t.guecontents, t.writedate, t.view_count as viewCount, COUNT(c.comment_id) as commentCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like as bl WHERE bl.board_id = t.id )as likeCount ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_bookmark as bb WHERE bb.board_id = t.id )as bookmarkCount FROM board_like as bl JOIN guestable as t ON bl.board_id = t.id JOIN gueuser u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE bl.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bl.likedate DESC

SELECT t.id, t.user_id as userId, u.writer as writer, u.name as name, t.title, t.guecontents, t.writedate, t.view_count as viewCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE c.board_id = t.id )as commentCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like as bl WHERE bl.board_id = t.id )as likeCount ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_bookmark as bb WHERE bb.board_id = t.id )as bookmarkCount FROM board_bookmark as bb JOIN guestable as t ON bb.board_id = t.id JOIN gueuser u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE bb.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bl.likedate DESC
